display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.8 旧全局急救清理版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: Maintenance Rabbit v1.8 removes legacy global rescue settings, automatic scans, timers, observers, and obsolete UI triggers while preserving the complete per-mirror rescue library and one-time upgrade migration. Prompt, pools, and Menu QR v2.1 remain unchanged.
